name: calendar-extractor
description: Extract calendar events from recent recording and keyboard transcripts and push a markdown digest to your iOS chat. Runs on demand and is auto-run by the javis-server session dispatcher (no approve-to-run card); extracted events are written PENDING and become solid only when the user taps Confirm in the iOS calendar table. Triggers: 'today's meetings', 'calendar extract', '今日会议', '提取日历'.
